prompt: create a milestone timeline line-chart of AI model parameter counts from 2012 (AlexNet) to 2025 (GPT-4o). Add star icons at landmark releases, ensure each marker is color-coded by model family, and fade gridlines for a minimalist look
prompt_refined: Generate a timeline line-chart illustrating the growth of AI model parameter counts from 2012 (AlexNet) to 2025 (GPT-4o). The horizontal axis should represent years, and the vertical axis should display parameter counts on a logarithmic scale. Prominent star icons are placed at key landmark AI model releases along the timeline. Each star icon marker is distinctly color-coded according to its corresponding AI model family, and a clear legend explaining these color assignments is included. Ensure gridlines are very subtle and faded, contributing to a clean and minimalist visual aesthetic.
objects: Timeline line-chart (showing AI model parameter growth)
Vertical axis (labeled with parameter counts and logarithmic scale indicator)
Prominent star icons (marking AI model releases)
Labels for specific AI models (e.g., AlexNet, GPT-4o)
